summary: Added a custom Systems Grid minigame for the platform engineering control plane with a generated control-tower texture, six data-derived system cells, responsive board styling, and local-only safety gate language.

queries: workflow orchestration dashboard observability control tower UI traces tasks queues gates design
incident command center control plane dashboard service request queue traces approvals UI
game UI system grid control tower node network dashboard inspiration
pattern_notes: The module treats workflow state, traces, queues, artifacts, and approval gates as separate inspectable systems.
The visual language borrows from orchestration and observability dashboards while staying game-like through nodes, levels, and animated control rails.
High-risk service requests and pending approvals remain visible as guarded cells rather than hidden implementation details.

checks.result: Passed with Guarded Core verdict, texture loaded, 6 system cells, 6 animated nodes, 4 scan beams, no board overflow, no console errors, and next control moving focus from Task Engine to Artifact Matrix.
Passed with compact stacked detail panel, texture loaded, 6 cells, 6 nodes, no board overflow, and no console errors.
Passed with full-width 6-cell grid, texture loaded, 6 nodes, no board overflow, and no console errors.
